$comment: Sweep version data for the GitHub Actions test matrices, consumed via jq in workflow prep jobs. Pinned axes (those not under sweep in a given matrix) default to devLock values from workspaces/libraries/pacwich-common/toolVersions/toolVersions.json. Add yarn / etc. to the pm matrix when supported. 'runtime' here refers to JS/TS runtime versions (bun + node); the runtime matrix sweeps both. 'pm' covers non-runtime package managers swept independently.
